zh.Featherstone, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾費亞黑斯東
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Collett於大約1518年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾費亞黑斯東時，他的父親William Collett24歲，母親Isabell Dearden20歲。他於大約1540年與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭越可爾費亞黑斯東結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Collett于大约1518年出生在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾費亞黑斯東时，他的父亲William Collett24岁，母亲Isabell Dearden20岁。他于大约1540年与Elizabeth在英国英格兰越可爾費亞黑斯東结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Collett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name Col(l), a pet form of Nicholas . There was also a feminine form, Collette, which may also have given rise to a surname. The name could also mean ‘Coll the younger’.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Collett was born about 1518, in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Collett, was 24 and his mother, Isabell Dearden, was 20. He married Elizabeth about 1540, in Featherstone, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1591, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Collett est né environ 1518, à Featherstone, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Collett, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabell Dearden, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth environ 1540, à Featherstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Collettが約1518年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアフエアスエルストーンで生まれた時，父William Collettは24歳，母Isabell Deardenは20歳であった。約1540年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフエアスエルストーンでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Collett(이)가 대략 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 피더스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Collett(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Dearden(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 피더스톤에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Collett родился около 1518 г. в местности фитирстоун, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Collett было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabell Dearden, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1540 г. в местности фитирстоун, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1591 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
